title: Lists
scope: General-purpose ordered collections: drag-reorderable items, optionally backed by a linked Trello board (Trello is the source of truth for board-backed lists). The foundation the To-Do app and any other 'ordered items' use case build on. NOT a to-do lens itself (that is the Todo app).

specs.title: Create a list
specs.behavior: Creating a list records a new ordered collection, assigns an l- id, and makes it available to add items to.

specs.title: Set list aliases
specs.behavior: Setting aliases attaches nicknames to a list so it can be resolved by those names in chat.

specs.title: Show a list
specs.behavior: Showing a list returns its items in their current order.

specs.title: Show all lists
specs.behavior: Showing all lists returns every available list, including board-backed and standalone lists.

specs.title: Add an item
specs.behavior: Adding an item appends it to a list (and, for a board-backed list, creates the backing Trello card).

specs.title: Remove an item
specs.behavior: Removing an item archives it off the list by text match.

specs.title: Move items between lists
specs.behavior: Moving items relocates them from one list to another by text match.

specs.title: Connect a Trello board
specs.behavior: Connecting a board registers it, scans its lists, creates local l- list files, and syncs cards in.

specs.title: Disconnect a Trello board
specs.behavior: Disconnecting a board removes its local l- files and its config entry.

specs.title: List Trello boards
specs.behavior: Listing boards returns all configured Trello boards and their settings.

specs.title: Sync a Trello list
specs.behavior: Syncing forces a Trello-linked list to re-pull from Trello, the source of truth.

specs.title: Suggest where an item lives
specs.behavior: Suggesting looks up where an item was last seen on Trello.

specs.title: Toggle item tracking
specs.behavior: Item tracking enables or disables item-history tracking on a Trello-linked list.

specs.title: Show a board
specs.behavior: Showing a board returns all of its lists and cards at once.

specs.title: Create / read / update / move / archive a card
specs.behavior: Card operations add a card, read its full details, update its title/description/due date, move it between lists, and archive it.

specs.title: Annotate a card
specs.behavior: Card annotations view or set a card's checklist, add comments, and manage its labels.

specs.title: Manage board labels
specs.behavior: Board-label operations list, create, update, or delete labels at the board level.
